---
title: "Perfect Observational data"
author: "Oamen Dominion, 2021332339"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r eraser}
rm(list = ls())
cat("\014")
```

```{r true model coefficients}
set.seed(123)


# ---- True Model Coefficients ----
beta0 <- 650000
beta_size <- 5000
beta_reno <- 150000
beta_urban <- 200000
beta_dist <- -2000
beta_interaction <- 2000
```

```{r Create Perfect Orthogonal grid}
# ---- Create Fully Crossed Orthogonal Design ----
design <- expand.grid(
  size_cat = c("Small", "Medium", "Large"),
  dist_cat = c("Near", "Far"),
  renovated = c("No", "Yes"),
  location = c("Rural", "Urban")
)

# Replicate each cell 90 times
design <- design[rep(1:nrow(design), each = 90), ]
rownames(design) <- NULL

# Verify dimensions and balance
dim(design)
table(design$size_cat, design$dist_cat)
table(design$renovated, design$location)
```
```{r Add Continuous Variables}
# Size - continuous within each size category
design$size <- ifelse(design$size_cat == "Small",
                      runif(nrow(design), 50, 131.59),
               ifelse(design$size_cat == "Medium",
                      runif(nrow(design), 131.59, 212.8),
                      runif(nrow(design), 212.8, 300)))

# Distance - continuous within each dist category and location
design$dist_km <- ifelse(design$location == "Urban" & design$dist_cat == "Near",
                         runif(nrow(design), 1, 16.75),
                  ifelse(design$location == "Urban" & design$dist_cat == "Far",
                         runif(nrow(design), 16.75, 32.5),
                  ifelse(design$location == "Rural" & design$dist_cat == "Near",
                         runif(nrow(design), 32.5, 66.25),
                         runif(nrow(design), 66.25, 100))))

# Check
head(design)
summary(design$size)
summary(design$dist_km)
```
```{r Response Variable}
# ---- Simulate Response Variable ----

# Error term
epsilon <- rnorm(nrow(design), mean = 0, sd = 50000)

# Simulate price using true model
design$price <- beta0 +
                beta_size * design$size +
                beta_reno * (design$renovated == "Yes") +
                beta_urban * (design$location == "Urban") +
                beta_dist * design$dist_km +
                beta_interaction * (design$size * (design$location == "Urban")) +
                epsilon

# Check
summary(design$price)
head(design$price)
```
```{r Orthogonal matrix}
X <- model.matrix(~ size_cat + dist_cat + renovated + location, data = design)
t(X) %*% X
```
```{r Correlation Matrix}
# ---- Correlation Matrix ----
# Convert factors to numeric first
design_numeric <- data.frame(
  size = design$size,
  dist_km = design$dist_km,
  renovated = as.numeric(design$renovated),
  location = as.numeric(design$location)
)

# Correlation matrix
cor(design_numeric)
```
```{r Correlation Scatterplot Matrix}
# ---- Continuous variables only in pairs plot ----
pairs(~ size + dist_km,
      data = design_numeric,
      main = "Scatterplot Matrix - Continuous Variables",
      col = as.numeric(design$location),  # colour by location
      pch = 19,
      cex = 0.5)

# Add legend
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("Rural", "Urban"),
       col = c(1, 2),
       pch = 19)

```


```{r Linear Regression Model}
model <- lm(price ~ size + dist_km + renovated + location + size:location, 
            data = design)
summary(model)
```
```{r Diagnostic Plots}
  # ---- Diagnostic Plots ----

par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 2))
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(model)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

```

```{r export dataset}
write.csv(design, file = "C:/Users/MC/Downloads/house_data_experimental.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Confirm export
cat("Dataset exported successfully!")
cat("\nRows:", nrow(design))
cat("\nColumns:", ncol(design))
```
